creator: yoanna.savova@cloudsigma.com
text: As a public cloud provider we pride ourselves on offering the latest operating system releases via our public library of instantly deployable images. FreeBSD is a popular distribution and we have a loyal following of FreeBSD users especially as we are one of the few public clouds that natively supports FreeBSD without modification. We are very pleased to offer version 9.0 with a 7 day free trial is an ideal opportunity for new customers to discover as well what the latest version has to offer.
